title: Parents’ excessive internet use may be lnked to depression in their teenagers
summary_en: A team of University of Wisconsin–Madison researchers found that parents’ internet use can negatively impact their kids’ well-being, but there are ways to help navigate and reduce this.
title_cn: 父母过度使用网络或与青少年子女抑郁存在关联

title: UW–Madison’s Unal recieves Early Childhood Champion Award
summary_en: Cigdem Unal received the Early Childhood Champion Award from the National Coalition for Campus Children's Centers (N4C) at the 2026 national conference.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校乌纳尔荣获幼儿教育先锋奖
